subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who hath sent down the verses as He willeth and hath caused all things to speak forth that there is none other God but Him, the All-Compelling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی نزل الایات کیف اراد و انطق الاشیاء علی انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Word of God and human limitations, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @idolatry, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
